desc: In src/index.js, the comparePrerelease helper has the semver §11 prerelease-precedence rule inverted: a version WITHOUT a prerelease tag should always be GREATER than the same version WITH one, but the current code treats a missing prerelease as smaller. Fix comparePrerelease so a missing prerelease wins, and when both sides have prereleases they are compared identifier-by-identifier (numeric identifiers compared numerically) so tests/semverprerelease.test.ts passes.
